name: Dwarf
traits: Darkvision 60ft; Dwarven Resilience (advantage vs poison saves, resistance vs poison damage); Dwarven Combat Training (battleaxe, handaxe, light hammer, warhammer); Tool Proficiency (smith's tools, brewer's supplies, or mason's tools); Stonecunning (+2× PB on History checks about stonework)

name: Hill Dwarf
traits: Dwarf traits + Dwarven Toughness (HP max +1 per level)

name: Mountain Dwarf
traits: Dwarf traits + Dwarven Armor Training (light and medium armor proficiency)

name: Elf
traits: Darkvision 60ft; Keen Senses (proficiency in Perception); Fey Ancestry (advantage vs charm; immune to magical sleep); Trance (4-hour meditation = 8-hour rest)

name: High Elf
traits: Elf traits + Elf Weapon Training (longsword/shortsword/shortbow/longbow); Cantrip (one wizard cantrip from list, INT mod); Extra Language

name: Wood Elf
traits: Elf traits + Elf Weapon Training; Fleet of Foot (speed 35); Mask of the Wild (hide when only lightly obscured by foliage/rain/snow/etc.)

name: Drow
traits: Elf traits + Superior Darkvision 120ft; Sunlight Sensitivity (disadvantage on attacks/Perception checks based on sight in direct sun); Drow Magic (dancing lights cantrip; faerie fire at 3rd; darkness at 5th) using CHA; Drow Weapon Training (rapiers/shortswords/hand crossbows)

name: Halfling
traits: Lucky (reroll natural 1 on attack/check/save once); Brave (advantage vs being frightened); Halfling Nimbleness (move through space of larger creatures)

name: Lightfoot
traits: Halfling traits + Naturally Stealthy (can attempt to hide when obscured by a creature at least one size larger)

name: Stout
traits: Halfling traits + Stout Resilience (advantage vs poison saves; resistance vs poison damage)

name: Human
traits: Standard variant: +1 to all six scores. Variant Human (PHB): +1 to two abilities, one skill proficiency, one feat

name: Variant Human
traits: One feat at 1st level; One skill proficiency

name: Dragonborn
traits: Draconic Ancestry (Black/Blue/Brass/Bronze/Copper/Gold/Green/Red/Silver/White - determines breath weapon and damage resistance); Breath Weapon (DEX or CON save, 2d6 at 1st, scales by level); Damage Resistance (matching ancestry)
subrace_options: Black, Blue, Brass, Bronze, Copper, Gold, Green, Red, Silver, White

name: Gnome
traits: Darkvision 60ft; Gnome Cunning (advantage on INT/WIS/CHA saves vs magic)

name: Forest Gnome
traits: Gnome traits + Natural Illusionist (minor illusion cantrip; INT-based); Speak with Small Beasts (limited communication with small or smaller beasts)

name: Rock Gnome
traits: Gnome traits + Artificer's Lore (+2× PB on History about magic items/alchemy/technology); Tinker (tinker's tools proficiency; build small mechanical devices: clockwork toy, fire starter, music box)

name: Half-Elf
traits: Darkvision 60ft; Fey Ancestry (advantage vs charm; immune to magical sleep); Skill Versatility (proficiency in 2 skills of choice)

name: Half-Orc
traits: Darkvision 60ft; Menacing (proficiency in Intimidation); Relentless Endurance (when reduced to 0 HP but not killed outright, drop to 1 HP instead, 1/long rest); Savage Attacks (extra weapon damage die on melee crit)

name: Tiefling
traits: Darkvision 60ft; Hellish Resistance (resistance to fire damage); Infernal Legacy (thaumaturgy cantrip; hellish rebuke at 3rd; darkness at 5th) using CHA
